name: Integration Google Sheets, Google Vertex AI (Gemini)

mapper.textPrompt:
Write a highly engaging, punchy YouTube Shorts video script based on the following topic. (response format :JSON Object with valid JSON)



Topic: 
{{1.`0`}}CRITICAL FORMATTING INSTRUCTION: You must separate your output sections using exactly three dashes "---". Output your response exactly like this, with no extra text or conversational filler:

[Write the video script here]
---
[Write the catchy video title here]
---
[Write the video description and hashtags here]

model.label: Gemini 2.5 FlashApplies smart reasoning to fast data tasks while ensuring quick response times

expect.name: useColumnHeaders
expect.label: Use column headers as IDs of the columns

messages.content:
Write a highly engaging, punchy YouTube Shorts video script based on the following topic.

Topic: {{1.`0`}}
CRITICAL FORMATTING INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Divide the script into short, punchy, individual scenes or sentences (max 10-15 words per line).
2. You must separate each scene/line using exactly three dashes on a brand new line ("---").
3. Do not include any conversational filler, introductory remarks, or concluding text. Output ONLY the raw scenes separated by the dashes.

Example Output Format:
[Visual: Fast edit] Audio: Stop learning coding the old way!
---
[Visual: Screen glowing] Audio: AI is changing everything in 2026.
---
[Visual: Text graphic] Audio: Focus on logic and architecture instead.

messages.message: 'OpenAI (ChatGPT, Sora, Whisper) - Generate a completion' [module ID 42] references inaccessible module 'Google Sheets - Watch New Rows' [module ID 1].
